title: erigeron glabellus var. viscidus
intro: Erigeron glabellus var. viscidus, also known as sticky fleabane, is a variety of the Erigeron glabellus plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Erigeron glabellus var. viscidus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and prevent infections.
